mapper.select: SELECT id, username, githubId, githubName, password, phone, nickname, email, avatar, role, status, last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, last_login_ip AS lastLoginIp, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM Auth WHERE githubId = #{githubId}

SELECT id, username, githubId, githubName, password, phone, nickname, email, avatar, role, status, last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, last_login_ip AS lastLoginIp, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM Auth WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Auth ( username, githubId, githubName, password, phone, nickname, email, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{githubId}, #{githubName}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE Auth SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
